rulings.Case Title: DEANNA L AUSSELET et al VS. WPX COURIER.LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 15, 2008, line 8, DEFENDANTS WPX COURIER.LLC, RAPID DELIVERY SOLUTIONS, LLC DBA WPX DELIVERY'S Motion For Change Of Venue IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS DEMONSTRATED THAT MATERIAL 3RD PARTY WITNESSES WILL APPEAR FOR TRIAL IN SAN FRANCISCO. A TRANSFER ON THE EVE OF TRIAL WOULD NOT SERVE THE INTERESTS OF JUSTICE. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO BRING DEANNA AUSSELET TO THE MEDIATION AND THAT NO TIME LIMITS MAY BE IMPOSED ON THE LENGTH OF THE MEDIATION. THAT IS AN ISSUE FOR THE MEDIATOR TO DECIDE. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW CRAMER VS. LORETTA H. HELLEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 15, 2008, line 10, PETITIONER ANDREW CRAMER'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS DENIED UNDER CCP SECTION 1286.2(a)(1). ROBINSON HAS PRESENTED A SERIES OF FACTS THAT RAISE SERIOUS AND MATERIAL QUESTIONS AS TO THE VAILIDITY OF THE AWARD. SPECIFICALLY, ROBINSON WAS NOT ALLOWED TO PARTICIPATE IN THE ARBITRATION WHEN BOTH PARTIES EXPRESSLY OR IMPLICITLY UNDERSTOOD THAT ROBINSON AS ADMINISTRATOR AND TRUSTEE WOULD BE RESPONSIBLE FOR PAYMENT; ATTORNEY MELBOSTAD'S REPRESENTATION OF BOTH HELLEN AND CRAMER IN CONNECTION WITH MATERIAL ASPECTS OF THE TRANSACTION AND THE FAILURE TO DISCLOSE CRAMER'S REFUSAL TO ASSIST ROBINSON IN THE SALE. =(302/PJM/PB)
